name: Quick Crab Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crabmeat, white American cheese, garlic salt, and butter in a bowl.
2. Place the mixture into the microwave and heat until the cheese and butter are melted.
3. Spread the melted mixture evenly on the split English muffin halves.
4. Broil the assembled muffins in an oven until they are browned to your desired level of doneness.
